message:
🐛 Fix GA4 error monitor timezone issue — drop dateHour filter

GA4's dateHour dimension uses the property's timezone (America/New_York),
not UTC, causing all events to be filtered out when the workflow runs in
UTC on GitHub Actions. Simplified to query by date range only — the
threshold + dedup + hourly cadence prevent noise.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
